channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Gearlock Firearms
item.description: Adds firearms powered by the gearlock mechanism

item.title: Alchemy
item.description: Potion mod that adds buffs to the player.

item.title: Dead
item.description: Leaves a lootable corpse of the player (with their exact skin and worn gear) at the death spot

item.title: Antique Harmony | Music Additions / Alternative Soundtrack
item.description: Adds to/replaces soundtrack with original orchestral one, written for the game.

item.title: Layout
item.description: Layout tool that produces inert, uninteractable 2D/3D voxel guidelines in various shapes.

item.title: GGBC's Model Tweaks
item.description: Optimizes Models without notable visual difference. Fixes Z-fighting.

item.title: TFK Flower Farming
item.description: A compat patch to allow for crafting seeds from modded flowers.

item.title: Dar's Commands
item.description: Some fun admin commands.

item.title: THUGCOOP - BB Patches
item.description: Stat edits to tools and items for thugcoop

item.title: Dar's Server Utilities
item.description: Combines my mods with the intent to be used specifically on Sundered Isles Server

item.title: Packrat Fork
item.description: Packrat adds a Storage Browser that lets you view and search the contents of all nearby containers.

item.title: Better coal
item.description: Changes the combustion time and temperature of the coke

item.title: Ice Cold Vessel
item.description: Adds ice-powered cooling to storage vessels for food preservation.

item.title: Auto Walk Extended
item.description: Toggle walking/sprinting. Options to toggle sneaking and automatic climbing.

item.title: MightyBamboo
item.description: Expansion of Bamboo usages, objects and recipes.

item.title: Akira's Tweaks
item.description: Collection of patches for a personal server.

item.title: The Jukebox
item.description: A simple Jukebox for all your listening needs.

item.title: RKN Generic Crafting
item.description: Generic crafting system that completely replaces the UI grid with a more immersive mechanic

item.title: Photo Mode
item.description: Press the HotKey to enable Photo mode and take your best screenshots!

item.title: Mobility
item.description: Step Up / Climb / Grab / Auto Walk / Auto Run

item.title: UnwhitelistedPlayerInventoryRecovery
item.description: Sends the inventories of players that are no longer whitelisted to the Lost&Found panning pool

item.title: Status HUD for Immersive Body Temperature
item.description: Adds StatusHUD custom elements for Immersive Body Temperature.

item.title: Immersive Body Temperature
item.description: Prepare for summer! Makes hot climates as challenging as cold ones.

item.title: Locust Drider Race (Drocust)
item.description: D&D drider, but turned into locust instead of spider

item.title: ClimateScalePatch
item.description: ClimateScalePatch modifies climate map generation during worldgen.

item.title: Equus: Wild Horses 2.0
item.description: Adds tameable wild horses to the game, successor to Equus: Wild Horses

item.title: Glider Timer
item.description: Allows you to set a configuration for a countdown in between glider uses, default is 5.

item.title: Launcher Mod Updater
item.description: An in-game mod updater that allows to download new updates for enabled mods.

item.title: Immersive Backpacks
item.description: An overhaul of backpack behavior and rendering in Vintage Story.

item.title: Status Hud Continued
item.description: Displays status information on the HUD.
